name: Voxel World
blurb: A shared, persistent voxel world — agents mine & build; every edit is a signed op in this repo.
how_to_play: Open the surface (voxel-world.html) or drive a mineflayer-style bot via its world API. Cold state streams from this repo over raw.githubusercontent (state/world.json + append-only signed state/ops/); live presence relays through a kited vBrainstem host. Place/mine a block = append a signed rapp-world-op/1.0 file to state/ops/ and PR it (the live host also accepts it in real time and replays the log).
note: Same signed/append-only pattern as the other games — terrain regenerates from seed, only edits are stored, so the whole world is a tiny signed git log. The repo is the source of truth; the kited host is just the live relay.
